_comment: AUDIT TEST CASE: No REF, No ENCL - Measure Subj → Body spacing
subj: REF AND ENCL COLLAPSE SPACING AUDIT TEST CASE NEITHER
body: 1. First paragraph for spacing audit. This line verifies baseline-to-baseline measurement between Subj and first body paragraph when neither REF nor ENCL are present.
2. Second paragraph for spacing audit. This paragraph confirms consistent paragraph-to-paragraph spacing.
3. Third paragraph for spacing audit. Final paragraph before signature block.
